name: Hip Abductor Machine
form_cues: Lean forward slightly to bias glutes over TFL
Slow eccentric — don't let the stack slam
notes: Seated machine. Press knees outward against resistance pads.
video_id_query: Hip Abductor Machine how to proper form
instructions: Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and place your outer knees against the resistance pads.
Set the start position so the pads are close together; grip the handles.
Lean forward slightly from the hips to bias the gluteus medius over the TFL.
Press the pads apart by abducting your hips — pause briefly at the end range.
Control the return; don't let the stack slam back together.
